task: Can you help me make a simple checklist for getting ready for school tomorrow? I want it to be easy to follow tonight so I don’t forget anything in the morning.

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a simple tonight checklist for getting ready for school tomorrow:

### School Tomorrow Checklist
- [ ] Put homework / papers in my backpack  
- [ ] Pack my folder, notebook, and any books I need  
- [ ] Set out clothes for tomorrow  
- [ ] Pack lunch or make sure lunch plans are ready  
- [ ] Charge my device / put in charger if needed  
- [ ] Put backpack by the door  
- [ ] Set an alarm for the morning  

If you want, I can make this even shorter — like a super quick 4-line version you can glance at fast.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah, this works. It’s simple and not messy.

The only thing I’d add is:
- [ ] Check if I need gym clothes / special stuff for tomorrow

But the list is good. I can use it tonight.
